value_alignment.note: Prioritizes academics (assignment/quiz), relationships (team meeting trust), and health (sleep cutoff) in line with the given weights.

communication_style.note: Direct, assertive planning with a compromise orientation, though the trajectory is mostly internal rather than showing explicit conflict management.

decision_tendencies.note: Uses medium-horizon, relatively risk-tolerant “ship baseline” strategy and actively enforces sleep discipline; minor mismatch as it repeatedly keeps working assignment over quiz.

goal_coherence.note: Goals evolve smoothly (baseline completion first → MVP/fallbacks and structured quiz prep → sleep-protecting cutoff) without abrupt persona shifts.

weakness_expression.note: Procrastination bias shows up partially as repeated re-affirmation and extended focus on assignment vs. moving to quiz; however, sleep-protection is fairly strong so it’s not a full ‘flawed Tired Achiever’ pattern.

overall.summary: Strong alignment with the Balanced Sophomore values and compromising, deadline-aware planning; only moderate evidence of the persona’s procrastination/weakness expression.
